chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) To the extent the department is required to determine a route under this chapter, the department shall base the department’s routing decision on information provided by the Texas Department of Transportation.

(b) The Texas Department of Transportation shall provide the department with all routing information necessary to complete a permit issued under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) , 623.121 (Permit to Move Portable Building Unit) , 623.142 (Permit to Move Oil Well Servicing or Drilling Machinery) , 623.192 (Permit to Move Unladen Lift Equipment Motor Vehicles) , 623.402 (Issuance of Permit) , or 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.003 — Route Determination

(a) To the extent the department is required to determine a route under this chapter, the department shall base the department’s routing decision on information provided by the Texas Department of Transportation.

(b) The Texas Department of Transportation shall provide the department with all routing information necessary to complete a permit issued under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) , 623.121 (Permit to Move Portable Building Unit) , 623.142 (Permit to Move Oil Well Servicing or Drilling Machinery) , 623.192 (Permit to Move Unladen Lift Equipment Motor Vehicles) , 623.402 (Issuance of Permit) , or 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) .

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B.4170), Sec. 21.002(21), eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The Texas Department of Transportation shall provide the department with all routing information necessary to complete a permit issued under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) , 623.121 (Permit to Move Portable Building Unit) , 623.142 (Permit to Move Oil Well Servicing or Drilling Machinery) , 623.192 (Permit to Move Unladen Lift Equipment Motor Vehicles) , 623.402 (Issuance of Permit) , or 623.421 (Permit for Vehicles Transporting Fluid Milk) .
